message:
Add loading skeleton, error state, and empty state to AdmissionWebhooks card (#3697)

The AdmissionWebhooks card called useCardLoadingState but never rendered
a skeleton when showSkeleton was true, and had no error or empty state
handling. When the API failed, the card rendered a blank area with no
user feedback.

- Destructure isFailed, consecutiveFailures, lastRefresh from the hook
  and pass them to useCardLoadingState for proper state reporting
- Render CardSkeleton when showSkeleton is true (initial load, no cache)
- Render an empty state with icon and message when showEmptyState is true
- Show an inline error banner when isFailed is true (3+ consecutive failures)

Closes #3675

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
